description: A graphic showing the out-of-focus backs of two Border Patrol agents in green uniforms with shoulder patches in the foreground, looking toward a section of tall steel border barrier running over arid hills under a pale sky. Large text at the top reads 'The Most Secure Border IN HISTORY', with a small 'HEARING RECAP' label and DHS seal at the bottom.
notable_text: The Most Secure Border IN HISTORY; HEARING RECAP
